corrections.text: Six of the ten cited sources (devclass.com, kristoff.it, byteiota.com, simonwillison.net, en.wikipedia.org, lilting.ch) were not on the project's source allowlist at submission time. All are reputable developer-tooling, language-community, or reference outlets; manually verified by the Chief Editor against the snapshot content.

The article attributes 'cannot be merged upstream' to DevClass in quote marks; DevClass's actual phrasing is 'cannot be upstreamed to Zig.' The meaning is the same; the quote marks should have wrapped the source's exact wording.
